content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年06月23日 周二
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [Forsy-AI/agent-apprenticeship](https://github.com/Forsy-AI/agent-apprenticeship)
   The living ecosystem where AI agents learn from real-world work through iterativ | ⭐682
2. [sums001/Windows-Copilot-API](https://github.com/sums001/Windows-Copilot-API)
   Reverse engineered Windows Copilot into an OpenAI-compatible API. Access GPT-4 a | ⭐342
3. [raiyanyahya/recall](https://github.com/raiyanyahya/recall)
   Stop wasting tokens and re-explaining your project every session. Recall gives C | ⭐322
4. [yo-WASSUP/Good-Badminton](https://github.com/yo-WASSUP/Good-Badminton)
   🏸  AI Badminton Hawk-Eye System | ⭐258
5. [briliwar0/glm-5.2-free-desktop-app](https://github.com/briliwar0/glm-5.2-free-desktop-app)
   glm 5.2 free z.ai  llm chatbot free api access local llm unsloth dynamic gguf ll | ⭐159
6. [zyn26/minimax-m3-desktop-app-free-api](https://github.com/zyn26/minimax-m3-desktop-app-free-api)
   minimax m3 free model  ai model free  api  large language model llm 1m context w | ⭐157
7. [lucasfishh/vanta](https://github.com/lucasfishh/vanta)
   Autonomous LLM squads compete in a tactical strategy game with on-chain Solana s | ⭐78
8. [wangzhezbz/codex-bridge](https://github.com/wangzhezbz/codex-bridge)
   Local multi-model gateway and desktop manager for Codex. 让 Codex 在一个模型栏里使用 GPT、D | ⭐40

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
